---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a security or architecture enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-review
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Describe the feature or enhancement you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? Why is this needed?

## Proposed Solution

How should this be implemented?

## Use Cases

Provide examples of when this feature would be used.

## Security Impact

- [ ] Improves security posture
- [ ] Reduces risk
- [ ] Enhances compliance
- [ ] Improves monitoring

## NIST CSF Alignment

- [ ] Identify
- [ ] Protect
- [ ] Detect
- [ ] Respond
- [ ] Recover

## Estimated Effort

- [ ] Small (< 1 week)
- [ ] Medium (1-4 weeks)
- [ ] Large (> 1 month)

## Implementation Dependencies

What components or prerequisites are required?

## Success Criteria

How will we know this feature is successful?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, diagrams, or references here.
